full_text:
Ding Yi (Zhengli) 丁儀 (正禮)
ARomance of the Three KingdomsEncyclopedia officer profile.
Ding Yi (丁儀), styledZhengli (正禮), was born in Qiao Commandery, Pei County. Supporter of Cao Zhi after Cao Pi slandered him. Executed with his brother by Cao Pi. Ding Yi was affiliated with the Wei Kingdom. Ding Yi lived during the Later Han Dynasty and Three Kingdoms period of Chinese history.
